text:
Created attachment 143750
20140613-pcsc-lite.diff

Fix build error with DEVELOPER=yes defined (python path shebang fix)
	Minor fixes to LICENSE and old USE_BZIP2.
	Add pkg-plist missing entry
	Strip final libraries

Fix:
CC'd maintainer for approval.

Tested with poudriere, logs at: http://poudriere.dan.tm/latest-per-pkg/pcsc-lite/1.8.11_1,2/
